case_title: OBERES, SONNY et al vs. NELSON, DAVID et al

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OBERES, SONNY OBERES, ELENA CARIAN, TERESITA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NELSON, DAVID $1,912.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,912.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- DEFENDANT TO PAY $731 TO MR OBERES, $731 TO MS OBERES, AND $450 TO MS CARIAN. STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFFS.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF OBERES, SONNY OBERES, ELENA CARIAN, TERESITA AS TO DEFENDANT NELSON, DAVID
